evals.prompt: Our paid social CPL jumped 40% this month and the team cannot agree which KPIs matter. Help me diagnose the funnel and set the right weekly reporting metrics.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-marketing/marketing-performance-analytics because the main problem is measurement, diagnosis, and KPI definition.

evals.prompt: Build a battlecard comparing us with three competitors and show how their messaging differs from ours.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-marketing/marketing-competitive-analysis because the main deliverable is competitor and positioning analysis.

evals.prompt: Using what we already know about the market, draft a landing page headline, subheadline, and CTA for our new webinar campaign.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-marketing/content-creation because the deliverable is the marketing artifact itself, not fresh analytics or competitor research.
